---
title: "Food"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

<video class="hero-video-only" autoplay muted loop playsinline>
  <source src="images/food-10.mp4" type="video/mp4">
</video>

# Food

A collection of cafés, comfort meals, desserts, and beautifully presented moments that make everyday life feel warm and memorable.

<div class="media-gallery two-col-gallery">
  <img src="images/food-1.jpg" alt="Food 1" class="media-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(0, foodMedia)">
  <img src="images/food-2.jpg" alt="Food 2" class="media-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(1, foodMedia)">
  <img src="images/food-3.jpg" alt="Food 3" class="media-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(2, foodMedia)">
  <img src="images/food-4.jpg" alt="Food 4" class="media-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(3, foodMedia)">
  <img src="images/food-5.jpg" alt="Food 5" class="media-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(4, foodMedia)">
  <img src="images/food-6.jpg" alt="Food 6" class="media-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(5, foodMedia)">
  <img src="images/food-7.jpg" alt="Food 7" class="media-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(6, foodMedia)">
  <img src="images/food-8.jpg" alt="Food 8" class="media-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(7, foodMedia)">
  <img src="images/food-9.jpg" alt="Food 9" class="media-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(8, foodMedia)">
  <div class="video-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(9, foodMedia)">▶ Video</div>
</div>

<script>
const foodMedia = [
  {type: "image", src: "images/food-1.jpg"},
  {type: "image", src: "images/food-2.jpg"},
  {type: "image", src: "images/food-3.jpg"},
  {type: "image", src: "images/food-4.jpg"},
  {type: "image", src: "images/food-5.jpg"},
  {type: "image", src: "images/food-6.jpg"},
  {type: "image", src: "images/food-7.jpg"},
  {type: "image", src: "images/food-8.jpg"},
  {type: "image", src: "images/food-9.jpg"},
  {type: "video", src: "images/food-10.mp4"}
];
</script>

<script src="gallery.js"></script>
